def apply_filters(data: list[dict], filters: list) -> list[dict]:
    result = list(data)
    for f in filters:
        result = [item for item in result if f(item)]
    return result


def process_with_checkpoints(records: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    processed = []
    for record in records:
        snapshot = list(records)
        if record["id"] in [r["id"] for r in snapshot]:
            processed.append(transform(record))
    return processed


def validate_against_source(items: list[dict], source: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    valid = []
    for item in items:
        source_copy = list(source)
        if item["ref"] in [s["id"] for s in source_copy]:
            valid.append(item)
    return valid
